'''âsh-s-h''' ('''kashasah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:edge|edge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:edge|edge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-s-h
|-
! Lemma
| kashasah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishasah|thishasah]] || [[word:jishasah|jishasah]] || [[word:shishasah|shishasah]] || [[word:kishasah|kishasah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushasah|thuthushasah]] || [[word:jujushasah|jujushasah]] || [[word:shushushasah|shushushasah]] || [[word:kukushasah|kukushasah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushasah|thushasah]] || [[word:jushasah|jushasah]] || [[word:shushasah|shushasah]] || [[word:kushasah|kushasah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushasah|thushasah]] || [[word:jushasah|jushasah]] || [[word:shushasah|shushasah]] || [[word:kushasah|kushasah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshasah|theshasah]] || [[word:jeshasah|jeshasah]] || [[word:sheshasah|sheshasah]] || [[word:keshasah|keshasah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshasah|thothoshasah]] || [[word:jojoshasah|jojoshasah]] || [[word:shoshoshasah|shoshoshasah]] || [[word:kokoshasah|kokoshasah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshasah|thoshasah]] || [[word:joshasah|joshasah]] || [[word:shoshasah|shoshasah]] || [[word:koshasah|koshasah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshasah|thoshasah]] || [[word:joshasah|joshasah]] || [[word:shoshasah|shoshasah]] || [[word:koshasah|koshasah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshasah|thĂŠshasah]] || [[word:jĂŠshasah|jĂŠshasah]] || [[word:shĂŠshasah|shĂŠshasah]] || [[word:kĂŠshasah|kĂŠshasah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashasah|thathashasah]] || [[word:jajashasah|jajashasah]] || [[word:shashashasah|shashashasah]] || [[word:kakashasah|kakashasah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashasah|thashasah]] || [[word:jashasah|jashasah]] || [[word:shashasah|shashasah]] || [[word:kashasah|kashasah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashasah|thashasah]] || [[word:jashasah|jashasah]] || [[word:shashasah|shashasah]] || [[word:kashasah|kashasah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashasah|shashasah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashasah|goshashasah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashasah|gokishashasah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashasahnĂŒ|shashasahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashasahnknĂŒ|goshashasahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashasahnĂŒ|gokishashasahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashasahshĂ«|shashasahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashasahnkshĂ«|goshashasahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashasahshĂ«|gokishashasahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashasahro|shashasahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashasahnkro|goshashasahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashasahro|gokishashasahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashasahmu|shashasahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashasahnkmu|goshashasahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashasahmu|gokishashasahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashasahsher|shashasahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashasahnksher|goshashasahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashasahsher|gokishashasahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashasahng|shashasahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashasahnkng|goshashasahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashasahng|gokishashasahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashasahya|shashasahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashasahnkya|goshashasahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashasahya|gokishashasahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashasahyam|shashasahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashasahnkyam|goshashasahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashasahyam|gokishashasahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashasahnĂŒshĂ«|shashasahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashasahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashasahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashasahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashasahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashasahnĂŒro|shashasahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashasahnknĂŒro|goshashasahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashasahnĂŒro|gokishashasahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashasahnĂŒmu|shashasahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashasahnknĂŒmu|goshashasahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashasahnĂŒmu|gokishashasahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashasahshĂ«nĂŒ|shashasahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashasahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashasahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashasahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashasahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashasahshĂ«ro|shashasahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashasahnkshĂ«ro|goshashasahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashasahshĂ«ro|gokishashasahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashasahshĂ«mu|shashasahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashasahnkshĂ«mu|goshashasahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashasahshĂ«mu|gokishashasahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashasahronĂŒ|shashasahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashasahnkronĂŒ|goshashasahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashasahronĂŒ|gokishashasahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashasahroshĂ«|shashasahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashasahnkroshĂ«|goshashasahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashasahroshĂ«|gokishashasahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashasahromu|shashasahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashasahnkromu|goshashasahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashasahromu|gokishashasahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashasahmunĂŒ|shashasahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashasahnkmunĂŒ|goshashasahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashasahmunĂŒ|gokishashasahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashasahmushĂ«|shashasahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashasahnkmushĂ«|goshashasahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashasahmushĂ«|gokishashasahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashasahmuro|shashasahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashasahnkmuro|goshashasahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashasahmuro|gokishashasahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
